title: Slimer's Foods!
description: Trade or find new ingredients to make and cook Vanilla-friendly foods!
body:
This Vanilla-Friendly mod adds custom foods from real life to Minecraft! You can find the new ingredients generating normally or trade for them with villagers.
The mod will update once a week or two.
Mod made with MCreator 2024.2.
Currently adds:
- Tomato
- Lettuce
- Cucumber
- Salt
- Cheese
- Blue Cheese
- Burger
- Noodles (Lots of variation)
- Cucumber Sandwich
- Sorghum
- Kisra
- Ground Beef
- Red Onion
- Tagalia

Updates/Trailers will be uploaded to my YouTube:
https://www.youtube.com/@Slimer87Mods
(Bugs can be reported in the comments)
